strategy: Killing the StrawHouse makes the StickHouse Sandstorm you every round; killing the StickHouse makes Tamworth Big Bad Hound you every round. The longer minions stay dead while the boss lives, the more AoE you eat.
Best line: AoE all three houses down together so no interrupt cheat ever starts. Stack blades/traps and hit with one AoE.
If you cannot one-shot the board, kill the minions last (or the same turn as Tamworth) to minimize the interrupt rounds.
Hit with Myth, Life, or Death - they take 13% more and Tamworth resists Balance 70%.
cheatNotes: Once the StrawHouse is defeated, the StickHouse interrupt-casts Sandstorm every round until it dies. Do not leave it alive alone.
Once the StickHouse is defeated, Tamworth interrupt-casts Big Bad Hound every round. Finish him fast after this point.
Beguiling the StrawHouse triggers the first cheat; Beguiling the StickHouse triggers both. Avoid Beguile on the minions.
